domain: Tlingit Chilkat blanket ceremonial weaving (Northwest Coast Tlingit/Haida/Tsimshian): pentagonal-shaped field 5-side asymmetric layout; 3-primitive curvilinear formline {ovoid, U-form, S-form} embedded in weave; cubist whole-decomposition splits crest animal into abstracted flat facets distributed across field; no-negative-space coverage; twining 2-weft strands around warp creates curves directly in fabric; black-yellow-blue-green palette; classic 1820s+ Chilkat style
specific_mechanism: CHILKAT-FORMLINE-3-PRIMITIVE-CUBIST-PENTAGON-DEFECT-TOPOLOGY: per-attention-head topology classifier with (1) 3-primitive formline vocabulary V_form: {O_ovoid, U_form, S_form} curvilinear element templates fitted to local attention windows; per-head dominant-primitive histogram; (2) pentagonal asymmetric field decomposition F_5: attention pattern partitioned into 5 asymmetric facet-regions (not rectangular grid); (3) cubist whole-decomposition C_dis: single concept ('crest animal') dissected and spread as flat-facets across 5 regions = single-feature dissemination across multi-head attention vs concentrated single-head representation; (4) no-negative-space coverage constraint L_nns: every facet-region must have content density above τ_density; regularizer pushes attention to cover all field; (5) twining 2-weft-around-warp interaction: pairs of attention heads (2-weft) compute joint correlations around shared key-vector (warp); produces curvilinear cross-head feature decomposition. Differs from R514 ROSEMALING-C-S-STROKE-CURVE-VOCAB-DEFECT (2-primitive C-S curve + winding-number + regional-style C:S ratio + KL-deviation, no 3-primitive ovoid/U/S + no pentagonal + no cubist + no no-negative-space + no twining 2-weft) and R526 FAROESE-3-PANEL-DEFECT-LADDER-WINDING (3-panel cellular + 5-motif + decrease-ladder + misalignment + LoRA patch, no curvilinear formline + no pentagonal + no cubist + no twining) by 3-primitive curvilinear vocabulary + pentagonal asymmetric 5-region + cubist whole-decomposition single-feature dissemination + no-negative-space coverage + twining 2-weft-around-warp paired-head correlation.
llm_application: CHILKAT-FORMLINE-3-PRIMITIVE-CUBIST-PENTAGON-DEFECT-TOPOLOGY per-head topology classifier + 3-primitive {ovoid, U-form, S-form} formline vocabulary V_form + pentagonal asymmetric F_5 5-facet field decomposition + cubist whole-decomposition C_dis single-feature dissemination across heads + no-negative-space coverage L_nns content-density constraint + twining 2-weft attention-head pair joint correlation around shared key-vector warp. Differs from R103. R475. R476 IDRIJA-LACE-DEFECT. R489 PERSIAN-MEDALLION-ROT. R501 BAGAJDA-BORE-PROFILE-ATLAS. R514 ROSEMALING (closest — 2-primitive + winding + KL-deviation). R526 FAROESE-3-PANEL (closest — 3-panel + 5-motif + decrease-ladder + misalignment). Differs from TOHA + Hidden Holes + Shape Reasoning Topology + Vulnerability TDA by 3-primitive ovoid/U/S + pentagonal + cubist + no-negative-space + twining. Differs by 3-PRIMITIVE OVOID/U/S FORMLINE + PENTAGONAL ASYMMETRIC 5-REGION + CUBIST WHOLE-DECOMPOSITION + NO-NEGATIVE-SPACE COVERAGE + TWINING 2-WEFT-AROUND-WARP.
novelty_claim: TOHA 2504.10063 + Hidden Holes 2406.05798 + Shape Reasoning Topology 2510.20665 + Vulnerability TDA 2410.03470 cover TDA-attention defect detection space. CHILKAT-FORMLINE-3-PRIMITIVE-CUBIST-PENTAGON-DEFECT-TOPOLOGY adds (a) 3-primitive ovoid/U/S formline vocabulary + (b) pentagonal asymmetric 5-region + (c) cubist whole-decomposition single-feature dissemination + (d) no-negative-space coverage + (e) twining 2-weft-around-warp paired-head correlation. Recombination — borderline lookup.
